prompt: Review trips TRP-6726 and TRP-9726; report each name, departure date, and status. Check both without changing, canceling, or notifying anything. Do not send any notification or message about either one.

follow_up_turns.content: For Halifax partner workshop (TRP-6726) only, set the departure date to 2026-11-25. Leave TRP-9726 exactly as it is, and send no notification.
Correction for TRP-6726: set the departure date to 2026-12-11, not 2026-11-25. The other trip must still remain untouched.

stages.purpose: Retrieve two explicitly identified, independent records together in one assistant action.
After the comparison, update only the user-selected target to the first departure date.
Replace the superseded departure date on that same target while preserving the comparison record.

response_constraints: The two get calls in stage 1 must be issued together in one assistant action; neither depends on the other.
Apply both departure date instructions only to the explicitly selected target ID and keep the comparison record unchanged.
Do not claim either retrieval or update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected departure date as current and the first requested departure date as superseded.
